criteriaResults.evidence: meta-tests/test-edge-cases.bats exists, contains #!/usr/bin/env bats shebang, and has load 'helpers/test-helper' at line 5.
Running 'bats meta-tests/test-edge-cases.bats' exits with code 0. All 21 tests pass (1..21, all 'ok').
Running 'bash meta-tests/run.sh' exits with code 0. All 132 tests pass. Summary line present: 'Meta-tests completed in 11s (exit code: 0)'.

grep -c '@test ' meta-tests/test-edge-cases.bats returns 21. Threshold is >= 15. Tests cover slugify, json_read, init_harness_state, update_handoff, update_regression_registry, git_create_sprint_branch, on-generator-stop, on-stop, log_cost, and update_progress.
Test at line 31: 'slugify: string containing only special characters returns empty string' passes '!@#$%^&*()' to slugify and asserts output == '' and status == 0.
Test at line 37: 'slugify: string containing only spaces returns empty string' passes '     ' to slugify and asserts output == '' and status == 0.
Test at line 72: 'json_read: binary file does not crash and returns empty string' creates binary file with printf '\x00\x01...', calls json_read, asserts status == 0 and output == ''.
Test at line 79: 'json_read: truncated JSON returns empty string without crashing' creates file with '{"name": ', calls json_read, asserts status == 0 and output == ''.
Test at line 86: 'json_read: deeply nested path returns correct value' creates JSON with .a.b.c.d.e = 'deep-value', reads with 5-level path, asserts output == 'deep-value'.

Test at line 123: 'init_harness_state: prompt with double quotes and single quotes produces valid JSON'. Passes prompt with both quote types, verifies jq -e . succeeds and userPrompt contains the quoted content.
Test at line 137: 'init_harness_state: prompt with newlines produces valid JSON'. Uses $'...\n...' syntax, verifies jq -e . succeeds and userPrompt preserves all three lines.

Test at line 172: 'update_handoff: called before init_harness_state creates handoff.json from scratch'. Removes handoff.json, calls update_handoff, verifies file created with completedSprints, currentSprint, and git fields.

Test at line 198: 'update_regression_registry: malformed contract JSON does not crash and preserves registry'. Creates 'not json at all' as contract, runs update_regression_registry, verifies registry.json remains valid JSON.

Test at line 217: 'git_create_sprint_branch: fails gracefully when harness branch does not exist'. Inits repo without harness branch, calls function, verifies non-zero exit code and no orphan branch created.
Test at line 239: 'on-generator-stop: multiple sprint directories with mixed statuses picks active one and blocks'. Creates sprint-01/pass and sprint-02/active, verifies exit code 2.

Test at line 252: 'on-generator-stop: hooks work from working directory with harness-state at expected relative path'. Creates harness-state in test temp dir, runs hook, verifies exit 0 -- confirming hooks read from cwd/harness-state/.
Test at line 264: 'on-stop: sprint-plan exists but no sprint directories at all allows exit'. Installs sprint-plan-3sprint.json but creates no sprint directories, verifies exit 0.
Test at line 275: 'log_cost: non-JSON output_json argument does not crash and defaults to 0 tokens'. Passes 'this is not json', verifies cost-log.json exists, inputTokens=0, outputTokens=0.
Test at line 293: 'update_progress: works when sprint-plan.json is missing'. Creates progress.md only, calls update_progress, verifies 'Sprint 01' and 'PASS' are appended.
run.sh output contains 'Meta-tests completed in 11s (exit code: 0)' -- matches expected 'Meta-tests completed in' pattern with duration and exit code.
Running 'bash meta-tests/run.sh --filter slugify' exits 0, shows 14 slugify tests, no unrelated tests (e.g., sprint_pad, json_read) in output.

setup() at lines 7-25 creates TEST_TEMP_DIR via mktemp -d, cds into it, sets HARNESS_STATE='harness-state' relative to temp dir. All tests create files in $TEST_TEMP_DIR or $HARNESS_STATE (within temp). No test references the project's actual harness-state/ path. Teardown in test-helper.bash removes TEST_TEMP_DIR.

All 21 @test names follow 'function_name: description' pattern (e.g., 'slugify: string containing only special characters returns empty string', 'json_read: binary file does not crash', 'on-generator-stop: multiple sprint directories...'). Verified by grep output of all @test lines.

Error/edge tests consistently check both exit status and output/state: slugify edge tests check status==0 AND output==''; json_read edge tests check status==0 AND output==''; git_create_sprint_branch checks exit_code!=0 AND verifies no orphan branch; log_cost checks file exists AND field values==0; update_regression_registry checks function runs AND registry remains valid JSON.
Total @test count across all .bats files: test-edge-cases=21, test-git=25, test-hooks=28, test-infrastructure=8, test-utils-pure=26, test-utils-state=24. Sum=132. Threshold is >= 80.

regressionResults.evidence: All 6 .bats files run individually: test-infrastructure.bats (8/8), test-utils-pure.bats (26/26), test-utils-state.bats (24/24), test-git.bats (25/25), test-hooks.bats (28/28), test-edge-cases.bats (21/21). Full suite via run.sh: 132/132 pass with exit 0. No regressions detected.

holistic.codeQualityNotes: Clean, well-organized test file with clear section headers. Tests follow consistent naming convention. Good use of existing test helper infrastructure. Proper isolation via setup/teardown. The custom setup() in test-edge-cases.bats correctly re-implements the test-helper setup pattern plus additional env var clearing.
holistic.completenessNotes: 21 edge case tests covering 8 distinct modules (slugify, json_read, init_harness_state, update_handoff, update_regression_registry, git_create_sprint_branch, hooks, log_cost, update_progress). All 25 contract criteria satisfied. Total suite now at 132 tests across 6 files.
holistic.robustnessNotes: Tests cover genuine edge cases: binary input, truncated JSON, special characters, newlines in prompts, missing prerequisites, malformed data. The git edge case test properly avoids bats 'run' to catch set -e failures. Error tests verify both status and state.
holistic.uxNotes: CLI tool project type: run.sh provides summary line with timing and exit code, --filter flag works correctly. Test output is readable TAP format. Test names are descriptive and follow consistent convention.

notes: Sprint 6 delivers a comprehensive edge case test suite that thoroughly covers boundary conditions, malformed input, and error recovery across all harness modules. All 25 criteria pass. The full 132-test suite runs in ~11 seconds with zero failures. No regressions from sprints 1-5.
